sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mi dang te kiang na ban bang mah

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa Topa kong thum hong ngai in
Mi dang te kiang na ban bang mah

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nang hong huh in ka up lahna

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nangma phatna bek ka suang hi
Na thupha tawh nong phel ding hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka nuamna teng bulpi Nang mah
